sections.paragraph: (Persic مردكى “little man,” or “worshipper of Mars,” from מְרֹדַךְ [Mordecai], pr.n. of a Benjamite living in the metropolis of Persia, by whom Esther was brought up, afterwards chief minister of the king, Est 2:5, sqq. LXX. Μαρδοχαῖος, [Also one who returned with Zerubbabel, Ezr 2:2 Neh 7:7 ].
